# Retrospective: 2026-02-03

**Trigger**: CI failure on main — coverage threshold breach after exploratory testing fixes

---

## 1. What Went Well?

| Observation | Evidence |
|-------------|----------|
| CI caught the issue before release | Build failed on main, not in production |
| Quick exploratory feedback loop | 5 fixes implemented same day as testing |
| Platform-specific test issue identified | Tests were macOS-only, now platform-agnostic |

---

## 2. What Could Improve?

| Issue | Impact | Proposed Action |
|-------|--------|-----------------|
| Fixes merged without tests | Coverage dropped 45% → 41.79% | Enforce `test:coverage` before commit |
| Skipped `@tester` in workflow | No regression tests written | Even quick fixes need test consideration |
| Pre-commit checklist incomplete | Only checks `npm test`, not coverage | Add `npm run test:coverage` to checklist |
| No local coverage gate | Developers don't see threshold failures | Consider pre-push hook |

---

## 3. Engineering Baseline Review

| ADR | Status | Notes |
|-----|--------|-------|
| EA-02 (Test Strategy) | ⚠️ Gap | Tests not written for 5 fixes |
| EA-03 (Security) | ✅ OK | No security-sensitive changes |
| EA-07 (Secrets) | ✅ OK | No credentials exposed |
| EA-10 (Documentation) | ✅ OK | No docs needed for bug fixes |

---

## 4. Agent Definition Review

| Agent | Update Needed? | Notes |
|-------|----------------|-------|
| `@reviewer` | ⚠️ Yes | Should enforce coverage check before approval |
| `@tester` | ⚠️ Yes | Should be consulted even for "quick fixes" |
| `@developer` | ⚠️ Yes | Should run `test:coverage` locally before commit |

---

## 5. Action Items

| Action | Owner | Status |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Update pre-commit checklist to include `npm run test:coverage` | @developer | ⬜ TODO |
| Add tests for ChatView improvements to restore coverage to 45% | @tester | ⬜ TODO |
| Consider pre-push git hook for coverage thresholds | @architect | ⬜ TODO |
| Update workflow to require `@tester` even for quick fixes | @team-lead | ⬜ TODO |

---

## 6. Commits Without Tests (Debt Log)

These commits need test coverage added:

- [ ] `55db5cd` - Multi-pane context (`getVisibleContextFiles`)
- [ ] `589583b` - CLI error sanitization (`sanitizeForDisplay`)
- [ ] `5a6c9ba` - Ghost cursor cleanup (streaming error handling)
- [ ] `c01bee8` - Edit capabilities prompt (system prompt changes)
- [ ] `8469e99` - Network error + restore input (`restoreInputOnError`)

---

## Next Retro

Schedule after Sprint 7 or next CI failure, whichever comes first.
